---
title: "Model-Structured Neural Networks on Edge Hardware: A Preliminary Study"
author:
  - "Giovanni Maria Francesco La Scala"
  - "Sebastiano Taddei"
  - "Francesco Baroni"
  - "Gioele Defrancesco"
  - "Filippo Faccini"
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
publication: "ICRA 2026 — RoboARCH 2026, 8th International Workshop on Robotics Acceleration with Computing Hardware and Systems (2026)"
type: poster
categories:
  - "Posters"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source:
url_preprint:
journ: "ICRA 2026 — RoboARCH 2026, 8th International Workshop on Robotics Acceleration with Computing Hardware and Systems"
venue: "ICRA 2026 — RoboARCH 2026, 8th International Workshop on Robotics Acceleration with Computing Hardware and Systems"
year: 2026
doi: ""
poster_pdf: poster.pdf
article_pdf: paper.pdf
pub_number: 56
order: -56
image: poster.png
---

::: {.poster-preview}
![](poster.png){fig-alt="Poster: Model-Structured Neural Networks on Edge Hardware: A Preliminary Study" width=95%}
:::
